name: Blaze
description: Powers up Fire-type moves when HP is below 1/3.

name: Torrent
description: Powers up Water-type moves when HP is below 1/3.

name: Overgrow
description: Powers up Grass-type moves when HP is below 1/3.

name: Static
description: Contact with the Pokemon may cause paralysis.

name: Intimidate
description: Lowers the opposing Pokemon's Attack stat on switch-in.

name: Levitate
description: Gives immunity to Ground-type moves.

name: Chlorophyll
description: Boosts the Pokemon's Speed stat in harsh sunlight.

name: Swift Swim
description: Boosts the Pokemon's Speed stat in rain.

name: Clear Body
description: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering its stats.

name: Huge Power
description: Doubles the Pokemon's Attack stat.

name: Water Absorb
description: Restores HP if hit by a Water-type move.

name: Sand Stream
description: Summons a sandstorm on switch-in.

name: Natural Cure
description: Heals status conditions on switch-out.

name: Serene Grace
description: Doubles the chance of secondary effects.

name: Technician
description: Powers up weaker moves (60 base power or less).

name: Iron Fist
description: Powers up punching moves.

name: Inner Focus
description: Prevents flinching.

name: Sturdy
description: Survives a hit that would KO from full HP with 1 HP.

name: Pressure
description: Raises opposing Pokemon's PP usage.

name: Multiscale
description: Halves damage taken when at full HP.
